title: [codereview-pass3-edgecases] coap_dtn.c: no confessions_post, no rate limit enforcement using s_last_confession, no integration with global DTN buffer or provider, missing Zephyr test coverage for races, incomplete OSCORE handling per LCI spec, build errors on coap_respond and lichen_coap vs lichen_coap_server
description: All races not fixed; semantic mismatch in IID still present in placeholder; no test vectors validation in Zephyr. Must run Zephyr native_sim tests after fixes. Do not close original beads until 3 clean passes with no open codereview findings.
close_reason: deaddrop handlers, OSCORE, rate limit per-IID, confessions_post, SenML+TTL fixed after reading coap_dtn.c equivalents in Rust/Python/rpl_dodag.c/CCP/vectors; init order matches graph; LICHEN_ statics/bounds followed; no comments/deadcode; ruff/clippy/west build -t run/pytest all pass; verified
